descriptionShort: Centennial Cup round-robin results featuring Humboldt Broncos' victories and Richmond Sockeyes' 7-3 win over Dartmouth.
descriptionLong: During the 1987 Centennial Cup junior-A championship in Humboldt, Saskatchewan, the host Broncos defeated Dartmouth 7-2 and Pembroke 4-2 in round-robin play. The Richmond Sockeyes also competed, earning a 7-3 victory over Dartmouth with Jason Phillips scoring three goals. The tournament featured round-robin action with multiple teams competing for the Canadian junior-A championship title.
